raw_consumer_statement: This is a follow up to prior complaint XXXX that was closed because the credit card company responded to your inquiry. The credit card company said it would take XXXX days to complete their investigation, but they keep extending their deadline and have now told us that the next update will come on XX/XX/XXXX, which is XXXX  months past the date of when we filed the disputes ( XXXX in total, all paid to the same vendor ). When we try and call them to discuss the disputes, no one is willing to help us, or explain to us what is happing.
